basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 25 Jr. Grade of Mizoram Health Service Posts
basic_details.post_name: Jr. Grade of Mizoram Health Service
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) has published the Jr. Grade of Mizoram Health Service Notification 2026 on 20 April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 25 Jr. Grade of Mizoram Health Service positions. Candidates within the age range of 21 to 35 years and holding BDS/MBBS Degree with Medical Registration along with Computer Proficiency and Mizo Language Proficiency are eligible to apply online at mpsc.mizoram.gov.in. The application process will be active from 20 April 2026 to 20 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable for ST/SC candidates up to 5 years, or as notified by the Government.

qualification.education_qualification: BDS/MBBS Degree, Medical Registration, Computer Proficiency, Mizo Language Proficiency
qualification.details: Dental Surgeon Sub-Cadre: BDS Degree from a recognized university. Permanent registration from a recognized National Council or State Council. GDMO Sub-Cadre: MBBS Degree from a recognized university. Completion of compulsory rotating internship. Preference for prior rural area service. Permanent registration from the Mizoram State Medical Council. General Requirements for all posts: Computer Proficiency, Mizo Language Proficiency.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC Jr. Grade of Mizoram Health Service recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for this recruitment drive is 20th May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for the Jr. Grade of Mizoram Health Service posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years for all the posts announced by Mizoram PSC in this notification.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for Scheduled Tribe (ST) and Scheduled Caste (SC) candidates, as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the GDMO Sub-Cadre posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree from a recognized university, have completed compulsory rotating internship, and hold permanent registration from the Mizoram State Medical Council.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be placed at Level 10 of the Pay Matrix, which offers a competitive salary as per government regulations.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Jr. Grade of Mizoram Health Service posts will be based on a Combined Competitive Examination conducted by the Mizoram Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify the application fee for General/OBC category candidates. Please refer to the official notification for any updates or details.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any application fees for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD)?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for candidates belonging to the PwBD category. They are exempted from paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: Mizoram PSC has announced a total of 25 vacancies for the Jr. Grade of Mizoram Health Service posts, including Dental Surgeon and GDMO sub-cadres.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Mizoram PSC Jr. Grade of Mizoram Health Service recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of Mizoram PSC. The application link and other relevant details are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
